title: Cured Pork Wok Burger
description: A smoky, savory, and velvety burger featuring cured ground pork, crispy lamination puff, and a rich wok-seared flavor, perfect for curing a hangover in a traditional Syrian dish.
instructions: Preheat the wok over medium heat.
In a bowl, combine ground pork, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add olive oil to the wok and swirl to coat.
Add the onion and garlic to the wok and cook until softened.
Add the mixed ground pork to the wok and cook until browned, breaking up with a spatula.
Roll out the lamination puff pastry and place it in the wok.
Press the pastry into the wok to form a crust.
Top the pastry with the cooked pork mixture.
Fold the pastry edges to form a crust and press to seal.
Cook for 10 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Serve hot garnished with fresh parsley.
